entries.summary: Agent starting ION-12316 visibility AWS SDK 2.x upgrade implementation
entries.detail: Agent using Claude Opus 4.6 for full implementation of visibility module AWS SDK upgrade

entries.summary: Phase 0 complete - codebase analysis and reference material gathered
entries.detail:
Completed comprehensive codebase analysis. Key findings:
- 5 DynamoDB entity classes in visibility-commons: ContainerEvent, ContainerEventOutbound, ContainerEventPending, ContainerTrackingEvent, BookingDetailVisibility
- 1 additional entity in visibility-wm-inbound-processor: CargoVisibilitySubscription
- 5 DAOs extending DynamoDBCrudRepository: ContainerEventDao, ContainerEventOutboundDao, ContainerEventPendingDao, ContainerTrackingEventDao, BookingDao
- 9 existing converters using SDK v1 DynamoDBTypeConverter
- SqsMessageHandler uses commons SQS (SDK v1)
- S3WorkspaceService uses AmazonS3 (SDK v1)
- SES already on SDK v2 (SesClient) in inbound module
- 11 sub-modules total
- Reference implementations studied: BookingDynamoModule, MetaDataConverter (booking), LegacyMapConverter, BookingDetail entity
- Cloud-sdk-api: DatabaseRepository, DefaultPartitionKey, DefaultCompositeKey, QuerySpec, BaseDynamoDbConfig
- commons version for cloud-sdk: 1.0.23-SNAPSHOT

entries.summary: Fixed all test files: S3WorkspaceServiceTest (StorageClient mock), CargoVisibilitySubscriptionDaoTest (DatabaseRepository mock), VisibilityApplicationInjectorTest (removed bindS3 call), VisibilityGPSEventApplicationInjectorTest (DatabaseRepository binding), VisibilityWMEventApplicationInjectorTest, VisibilityPendingApplicationInjectorTest, VisibilityInboundApplicationInjectorTest (all replaced DynamoDBMapper/Config with DatabaseRepository bindings, removed bindS3 calls), ContainerEventTableDaoTest (anyIterable→anyList). Full test-compile passes for all visibility modules.

Fixed InboundEdiProcessorTest.failedS3Read: changed IOException mock to RuntimeException since StorageClient.getContent() no longer throws checked exceptions. Removed unused IOException import. visibility-inbound tests now pass (EXIT 0). Running full visibility test suite for final verification.

ALL visibility module tests pass (EXIT 0). Fixed: S3WorkspaceServiceTest, CargoVisibilitySubscriptionDaoTest, 4 injector tests (replaced DynamoDBMapper/bindS3 with DatabaseRepository/StorageClient), InboundEdiProcessorTest (IOException→RuntimeException), ContainerEventTableDaoTest (anyIterable→anyList), added BookingDetailVisibility binding to pending test.
entries.detail: mvn test -pl visibility -amd -am -q → EXIT: 0. All visibility module tests pass including: visibility-commons (DAO tests, S3WorkspaceServiceTest, VisibilityApplicationInjectorTest), visibility-inbound (InboundEdiProcessorTest, ContainerEventTableDaoTest, VisibilityInboundApplicationInjectorTest), visibility-pending (VisibilityPendingApplicationInjectorTest with BookingDetailVisibility binding, PendingSqsProcessor tests), visibility-wm-inbound-processor (CargoVisibilitySubscriptionDaoTest, VisibilityWMEventApplicationInjectorTest), visibility-itv-gps-processor (VisibilityGPSEventApplicationInjectorTest), visibility-lambda modules.

entries.summary: CRITICAL: booking-2.1.8.M.jar in visibility lib had OLD SDK v1 annotations. Generated new booking-3.0.0.M.jar from current develop source with SDK v2 annotations. Fixed BookingDao.getHashKey()→getBookingId() (DynamoHashAndSortKey interface removed in SDK v2). Updated visibility-commons/pom.xml from 2.1.8.M to 3.0.0.M.
entries.detail:
Old JAR (booking-2.1.8.M.jar): Created Apr 2, 2026. Contains com.amazonaws.services.dynamodbv2.datamodeling.* annotations.
New JAR (booking-3.0.0.M.jar): Built from current develop source. Contains software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.mapper.annotations.* and com.inttra.mercury.cloudsdk.database.annotation.* annotations.
Generated using: mvn compile -pl booking -am, then jar cf from booking/target/classes with same includes as booking-model profile.
BookingDao fix: getHashKey() was from DynamoHashAndSortKey interface (removed in SDK v2), replaced with getBookingId() in two log statements.

entries.summary: All visibility tests pass with new booking-3.0.0.M.jar containing SDK v2 annotations. EXIT: 0.
entries.detail: Full visibility test suite passes with new booking-3.0.0.M.jar (SDK v2 annotations). Command: mvn test -pl visibility -amd -am -q → EXIT: 0. BookingDao.getHashKey()→getBookingId() fix verified. No regressions from booking model upgrade.

entries.summary: Phase 5 committed (2a593bf407). Design doc created. Session paused for context window management. Phases 6-10 remain.
entries.detail:
Committed as 2a593bf407 on branch feature/ION-12316-visibiilty-aws-upgrade-copilot. 61 files changed, 1984 insertions, 1610 deletions. Design doc created at visibility/docs/2026-05-31-visibility-aws-upgrade-copilot.md.

REMAINING WORK:
- Phase 6: Dropwizard service internals (ContainerEventTableDao DynamoDB Document API migration, table creation commands, ElasticSearch auth, sub-module Guice injector updates)
- Phase 7: Lambda functions (visibility-s3-archiver, visibility-pending-start, visibility-outbound-poller, visibility-error-email)
- Phase 8: Full mvn verify, app startup test
- Phase 9: Update design doc with final changes
- Phase 10: Final commit

KEY NOTES FOR NEXT SESSION:
- cloud-sdk version is 1.0.26-SNAPSHOT
- booking model JAR is 3.0.0.M (SDK v2, built from develop source)
- SQS usage via commons SqsMessageHandler should NOT change (commons library still SDK v1)
- Lambda runtime event models (SQSEvent, SNSEvent, etc.) must stay SDK v1 (AWS provides these)
- ElasticSearch auth (AWS4Signer) may stay SDK v1 as ES migration is separate scope
- ContainerEventTableDao uses DynamoDB Document API for GSI queries — consider delegating to ContainerEventDao repository
- All visibility entities have getHashKey() methods defined on themselves (not inherited), so those compile fine

entries.summary: Resuming implementation - Phase 5 commit exists, checking compilation and test state
entries.detail: Branch feature/ION-12316-visibiilty-aws-upgrade-copilot has 1 commit: 'ION_12316: Migrate visibility-commons entities, DAOs, converters, S3 to cloud-sdk (Phase 5)' with 60 files changed. Now checking compilation state.
Agent using Claude Opus 4.6 for continuing implementation of visibility module AWS SDK upgrade

entries.summary: Phase 6 progress: ContainerEventTableDao migrated to cloud-sdk GSI query; discovered VisibilityDynamoModule wiring gap
entries.detail:
DONE this session:
1. ProvisionedThroughputExceededException v1->v2 import swap in MatchingProcessor, OutboundSingleTransactionProcessor, PendingSqsProcessor, InboundEdiProcessor (compiles green).
2. Added ContainerEventDao.queryIndex(indexName, partitionKeyName, partitionKeyValue) using DefaultQuerySpec.builder().indexName().partitionKeyName().partitionKeyValue(CloudAttributeValue.ofString()).consistentRead(false) -> repository.query(). 
3. Rewrote ContainerEventTableDao: removed SDK v1 Document API (DynamoDB/Table/Index/QuerySpec/ValueMap) + DynamoDB constructor param + VisibilityInboundApplicationConfig param. New constructor (ContainerTrackingEventDao, ContainerEventDao). queryIndex now calls containerEventDao.queryIndex(...), filters by item.getHashKey().startsWith("ce:") into ceIds, then containerEventDao.findAll(ceIds). Preserves two-step mixed-model behavior.
4. Rewrote ContainerEventTableDaoTest for new constructor + queryIndex mock. Added queryIndexFiltersOnlyContainerEventIds test.
TESTS: visibility-commons + visibility-inbound full suite = 411 tests, 0 failures, 2 skipped. BUILD SUCCESS.

CRITICAL FINDING (blocker for app startup): VisibilityDynamoModule (the cloud-sdk DAO provider created in Phase 5) is NOT installed in ANY application. All 7 visibility apps still use legacy `new DynamoDBModule(c.getDynamoDbConfig(), e)` from dynamo.respository: VisibilityInboundApplication, VisibilityMatcherApplication, VisibilityOutboundApplication, VisibilityPendingApplication, VisibilityGPSEventApplication, VisibilityWMEventApplication, and visibility-s3-archiver HandlerSupport. Booking pattern (reference): .moduleGenerator((c,e)->new BookingDynamoModule(c,e)) + .command(new BookingDynamoDbAdminCommand()) extending cloud-sdk DynamoDbAdminCommand listing entity classes.

REMAINING Phase 6/7 TODO:
- Install VisibilityDynamoModule(c) in all apps; remove legacy DynamoDBModule generator (verify no other consumers of DynamoDBMapper/AmazonDynamoDB bindings remain).
- Replace 3 table-creation commands (DynamoContainerEventsTableCommand/OutboundTableCommand/PendingTableCommand) + CreateTables with single VisibilityDynamoDbAdminCommand extends DynamoDbAdminCommand listing ContainerEvent, ContainerEventOutbound, ContainerEventPending (and ContainerTrackingEvent for shared table?). Update DynamoContainerEventsTableCommandTest.
- Migrate 4 lambdas (Phase 7).
- Phase 8 full verify + integration tests; Phase 9 design doc; Phase 10 commit ION_12316.

entries.summary: Phase 7 complete: migrated all 4 visibility lambdas to cloud-sdk (S3/DynamoDB/SQS/SSM)
entries.detail: Migrated visibility-s3-archiver (S3->StorageClient, DynamoDB v1 Document API->v2 DynamoDbClient.getItem with raw-map conversion helpers toJavaMap/toJavaObject; dropped v1 com.amazonaws.util.IOUtils from test using inputStream.readAllBytes()), visibility-pending-start (AmazonSQS->MessagingClient<String> via MessagingClientFactory), visibility-outbound-poller (AmazonSQS->MessagingClient, SSM->CloudParameterStore; FIXED static-init mockStatic conflict by making PARAMETER_STORE lazy via double-checked getParameterStore()), visibility-error-email (ParameterStoreResolver AWSSimpleSystemsManagement->CloudParameterStore with package-private constructor for testing, region resolution via DefaultAwsRegionProviderChain w/ US_EAST_1 fallback; removed unused SdkClientException import). Deliberate v1 retained: lambda.runtime.events.* and dynamodbv2.model.OperationType. Tests: s3-archiver 9, pending-start 4(1 skip), outbound-poller 2, error-email 14(1 skip), all visibility-commons 183 — BUILD SUCCESS.

entries.summary: Task 4 complete: all 5 remaining visibility apps swapped to cloud-sdk VisibilityDynamoModule (commit 3bb89dc2e3)
entries.detail: Swapped outbound, pending, matcher, itv-gps, wm applications from legacy DynamoDBModule to VisibilityDynamoModule. itv-gps and wm configs refactored to extend VisibilityApplicationConfig. wm had an extra entity CargoVisibilitySubscription not covered by VisibilityDynamoModule. First attempt added @Provides provideCargoVisibilitySubscriptionDao(DynamoDbClientConfig) directly into VisibilityWMEventApplicationInjector, which broke VisibilityWMEventApplicationInjectorTest (Guice MissingConstructor for DynamoDbClientConfig — the test instantiates the injector standalone and mocks the repository). FIX: created dedicated VisibilityWMDynamoModule (AbstractModule) that provides CargoVisibilitySubscriptionDao from DynamoDbClientConfig, wired in VisibilityWMEventApplication via .moduleGenerator((c,e)->new VisibilityWMDynamoModule()); reverted the injector to its original form so unit tests can still bind a mocked DatabaseRepository. Test results: itv-gps + commons 183/410(2 skip); wm 117 tests 0 errors; BUILD SUCCESS. Committed 3bb89dc2e3 (8 files).

entries.summary: Phase 7.5/8/9 complete: app module swaps committed, full online verify BUILD SUCCESS, summary doc committed
